query:

ADD COLUMN previousVersionId INT,
ADD COLUMN whenToUse TEXT,

ADD COLUMN testCases TEXT,
ADD COLUMN lastTestedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN testPassRate DECIMAL(3,2);
